blur_detection.description: The text and edges are moderately blurred, likely due to camera movement or out-of-focus capture.
blur_detection.recommendation: Retake the image ensuring the camera is steady and the document is in focus.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be improved for better readability.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Ensure proper lighting and avoid shadows when capturing the document.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that affect text readability.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration detected on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: Minor creases are present but do not significantly affect text legibility.
tears_or_folds.recommendation: Flatten the document before capturing the image to reduce creases.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the document edges are cut off, but critical information is still visible.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing the image.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections detected; all expected content is present.

obstructions.description: No obstructions or shadows are present that block document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, and item description. These elements collectively indicate that this is an expense document related to travel.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 required fields, including supplier (SBB CFF FFS), consumer (GONUGUNTLA HAREESH KUMAR), transaction amount (CHF 120.00), transaction date (20.12 and 19.01), invoice/receipt number (Ticket-ID 329584805708, Order no.: 25302067899), and item description (Swiss Half Fare Card). This meets the criteria for an expense document.

extraction.discount_info: Up to 50% discount on 1st and 2nd class tickets within one month.
extraction.discount_card_requirement: Only valid with your Passport / ID.
extraction.tariff_info: The current tariff of Swiss transport companies, in particular the common ancillary tariff regulations for direct service and regional transport networks (T600) as well as the tariffs of the regional transport and fare networks, apply to the use of Tickets.
extraction.ticket_conditions: E-Tickets are personal and not transferable. The ticket has to be presented to the control staff along with an official identity document and / or with any discount card.
extraction.refund_conditions: For refunds, T600.9 or the conditions of the relevant transport company or operator apply. Refunds of e-tickets in the context of international journeys are made in according with international terms and conditions.
extraction.special_notes: E-Tickets are personal and not transferable. The ticket has to be presented to the control staff along with an official identity document and / or with any discount card.

issues.description: The transaction date is missing on the receipt.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not be sufficient

issues.description: The ICP company details are missing on the invoice.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: The Local Employer's name and details should appear on invoices, except where this won't be possible e.g. flight bookings

issues.description: The total amount of CHF 120 for the Swiss Half Fare Card may be subject to tax.
issues.recommendation: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax free
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Overnight expenses such as hotels and transport should be reimbursed as expenses against receipts and invoices - all approved expenses will be paid as NET to employee and grossed up if not tax free

issues.description: Additional documentation is required for this expense.
issues.recommendation: Workers should submit a separate report per each business trip
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Workers should submit a separate report per each business trip

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing the transaction date and ICP company details, which are mandatory fields. The total amount may be subject to tax and requires gross-up. Additionally, a separate report per business trip is required.
